resolution_strategy: Use tightly scoped data/test/doc edits only. Preserve all existing prior-session changes and avoid unrelated refactors.

decisions.risk: Dirty working tree includes previous blind-box refactor artifacts.
decisions.decision: Treat them as baseline for this patch; do not revert or overwrite unrelated content.

decisions.risk: Forbidden pattern list could catch legitimate object names.
decisions.decision: Use precise non-object terms from user feedback and current bad entries, such as 折线, 擦痕, 气泡, 阴影, 边线, 微小沙粒, 微小污点, 细小石子, 漂浮细海草丝, 草地碎叶点.

decisions.risk: Changing five-layer keys would break compatibility.
decisions.decision: Keep all keys and compatibility mapping unchanged; change only list contents and tests.
